top_signals.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
top_signals.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: MiniMax Shares Slump After JPMorgan Cuts Target Price Further
top_signals.summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s shares plunged, after JPMorgan Chase & Co. slashed the Chinese AI model maker’s price target for the second time in less than a week on value dilution concerns caused by fresh fundraising.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Shippers face deepening dilemma as U.S. and Iran vie for control of Persian Gulf
top_signals.summary: Last week's hostilities between Iran and the U.S. have caused ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz to plummet from levels reached after a June truce between both countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Six out of 10 in Japan using generative AI to plan summer trips, survey finds
top_signals.summary: A larger proportion of those with school-age children are also OK with them using AI when doing their homework during the summer than those who are not.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Phillies’ Zack Wheeler rejects All-Star invite after being passed over initially
top_signals.summary: Wheeler said he didn't want to "be the fifth option."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
